channel.title: Automations on Aamu.app blog
channel.description: Recent content in Automations on Aamu.app blog

item.title: From form submission to follow-up: workflows with Aamu.app
item.description: How to connect Aamu Forms, Databases, Automations, Webhooks, Tasks, Emails, and CRM into practical end-to-end workflows.

item.title: Building with the Aamu API: From Tasks to Docs and GraphQL
item.description: A practical guide to the Aamu API for tasks, docs, meetings, files, forms, database automations, GraphQL rows, and activity timelines.

item.title: Database automations with Aamu.app
item.description: How Aamu.app database automations and the Automations API turn inserted or updated rows into emails and follow-up tasks.
